basic_details.job_title: IGRUA Assistant Operations Officer Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Indira Gandhi Rashtriya Uran Akademi (IGRUA), Amethi
basic_details.short_information: IGRUA Amethi is recruiting 2 posts of Assistant Operations Officer on contractual basis. Last date to apply is 25 July 2026.

qualification.details: criteria: Details | age limit: Maximum 35 years as on 01.07.2026
qualification.education_qualification: Holder of Commercial Pilot License (CPL). Currency not mandatory.
qualification.experience: Experience in Flying Operations in a Flying Training Organization (FTO) in India.

vacancy_details.details: Total 02 vacancies for Assistant Operations Officer.

salary_details.details: Basic Pay: Rs. 40,000/- (Fixed) per month Transport Allowance: Rs. 1,800/- per month Aviation Allowance: Rs. 300/- per month Accommodation: Subject to availability

selection_process: Shortlisted candidates will be called for Written Test / Interview (Online/Offline). Final selection is subject to document verification and medical fitness.
how_to_apply: Candidates must send their applications only through email to: [email protected]
Prepare a single PDF file containing: CV (first) Self-attested educational certificates (10th onwards) Self-attested experience certificates (earliest to latest)
Mention in the subject line: “APPLICATION – ASSISTANT OPERATIONS OFFICER IGRUA/ADVT/22/2026”
Only shortlisted candidates will be informed for further selection process.
important_instructions: Appointment is purely contractual and does not confer any right for regular absorption. Mere submission of application does not guarantee call for interview. Canvassing in any form will lead to disqualification. Jurisdiction for any dispute will be Lucknow courts only. IGRUA reserves the right to cancel or modify the recruitment process.

content_sections.heading: Indira Gandhi Rashtriya Uran Akademi Assistant Operations Officer Recruitment 2026 Notification
content_sections.text: Indira Gandhi Rashtriya Uran Akademi (IGRUA), an autonomous body under the Ministry of Civil Aviation, Government of India, has invited applications for the post of Assistant Operations Officer. The academy is located at Fursatganj Airfield, Amethi (UP). Download Indira Gandhi Rashtriya Uran Akademi Assistant Operations Officer Recruitment 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: IGRUA Assistant Operations Officer Recruitment 2026 Overview
content_sections.text: IGRUA Amethi is recruiting 2 posts of Assistant Operations Officer on contractual basis. Last date to apply is 25 July 2026.

rows.indira_gandhi_rashtriya_uran_akademi_igr: Rs. 40,000/- (Fixed) + Transport Allowance Rs. 1,800 + Aviation Allowance Rs. 300

content_sections.heading: IGRUA Assistant Operations Officer Recruitment 2026 Vacancy Details
content_sections.text: Total 02 vacancies for Assistant Operations Officer.

content_sections.heading: IGRUA Assistant Operations Officer Recruitment 2026 Eligibility Criteria

rows.details: Holder of Commercial Pilot License (CPL). Currency not mandatory.
Experience in Flying Operations in a Flying Training Organization (FTO) in India.

content_sections.heading: IGRUA Assistant Operations Officer Recruitment 2026 Remuneration Details
content_sections.text: Basic Pay: Rs. 40,000/- (Fixed) per month Transport Allowance: Rs. 1,800/- per month Aviation Allowance: Rs. 300/- per month Accommodation: Subject to availability

content_sections.heading: IGRUA Assistant Operations Officer Recruitment 2026 Selection Process
content_sections.text: Shortlisted candidates will be called for Written Test / Interview (Online/Offline). Final selection is subject to document verification and medical fitness.

content_sections.heading: How to Apply for IGRUA Assistant Operations Officer Recruitment 2026
content_sections.text: Candidates must send their applications only through email to: [email protected] Steps to Apply: Prepare a single PDF file containing: CV (first) Self-attested educational certificates (10th onwards) Self-attested experience certificates (earliest to latest) Mention in the subject line: “APPLICATION – ASSISTANT OPERATIONS OFFICER IGRUA/ADVT/22/2026” Send the email before 25 July 2026. Only shortlisted candidates will be informed for further selection process.

content_sections.heading: Important Instructions for IGRUA Assistant Operations Officer Recruitment 2026 Candidates
content_sections.text: Appointment is purely contractual and does not confer any right for regular absorption. Mere submission of application does not guarantee call for interview. Canvassing in any form will lead to disqualification. Jurisdiction for any dispute will be Lucknow courts only. IGRUA reserves the right to cancel or modify the recruitment process.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for IGRUA Assistant Operations Officer 2026?
faq.answer: The last date for receipt of applications is 25 July 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the salary for Assistant Operations Officer at IGRUA Amethi?
faq.answer: Fixed remuneration of Rs. 40,000 per month + Transport Allowance Rs. 1,800 + Aviation Allowance Rs. 300.

faq.question: Q3. What is the essential qualification for IGRUA Assistant Operations Officer post?
faq.answer: Candidates must hold a valid Commercial Pilot License (CPL). Current currency is not mandatory.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for IGRUA Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Maximum 35 years as on 01.07.2026.

faq.question: Q5. How to apply for IGRUA Assistant Operations Officer vacancy?
faq.answer: Send application with CV and self-attested documents in single PDF to [email protected] with proper subject line.

faq.question: Q6. Is experience mandatory for IGRUA Assistant Operations Officer?
faq.answer: Yes, experience in Flying Operations in a Flying Training Organization (FTO) in India is essential.

faq.question: Q7. Will IGRUA provide accommodation to selected candidates?
faq.answer: Accommodation/quarters will be provided subject to availability.

faq.question: Q8. What is the mode of appointment at IGRUA Amethi?
faq.answer: The appointment is purely contractual for 11 months and extendable as per requirement.

faq.question: Q9. Is CPL currency mandatory for IGRUA Assistant Operations Officer post?
faq.answer: No, possession of CPL is required but currency is not mandatory.

faq.question: Q10. Will there be any written test for IGRUA recruitment?
faq.answer: Shortlisted candidates may be called for written test and/or interview.
